overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through rainy nighttime streets in a historic Southern city. The character navigates past the Lemoyne National Bank, covered sidewalks, and groups of NPCs in an atmospheric gas-lit urban environment with wet cobblestones and Victorian-era architecture.

events.description: character turns left from narrow sidewalk onto wider main street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beside the bank, then turning onto the main cobblestone street

entered.detail: stone building with large illuminated windows displaying 'Lemoyne National Bank' signage
multi-story stone building with arched windows and decorative cornices
rain-slicked cobblestone road reflecting gas lamp light
tall cast-iron street lamp emitting warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a narrow sidewalk beside the Lemoyne National Bank in a rainy nighttime city. The character walks past the bank's illuminated windows and turns left onto a wider cobblestone street lined with historic stone buildings. Gas street lamps cast warm reflections on the wet ground as the character transitions from the enclosed sidewalk to the open street.

events.description: enters covered wooden sidewalk with overhead awning protection from rain
passes stationary horse-drawn carriage parked along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, passing storefronts and a parked carriage

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage parked stationary at the sidewalk edge

entered.detail: wooden roof structure extending over the sidewalk providing shelter from rain
black wooden carriage with large wheels parked at the curb
weathered paper posters and advertisements plastered on the building wall
ornate wall-mounted gas lamp with warm orange glow

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered wooden sidewalk protected from the rain by an overhead awning. The environment features historic storefronts with posters and wall-mounted gas lanterns. A stationary horse-drawn carriage is parked on the left side as the character passes by, moving deeper into the covered walkway area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open historic street with saloons and shops

events.description: exits covered sidewalk back into open rain-exposed street
passing under brighter gas lamps near the saloon entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the open cobblestone street past saloons and storefronts, exposed to the rain

entered.detail: two-story building with arched windows, balcony, and warm interior lighting
empty wooden freight wagon with slatted sides parked on the street
building with decorative ironwork balcony and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the character enters an open cobblestone street exposed to the light rain. The street features a prominent saloon building with warm glowing windows and a wooden freight wagon parked nearby. Gas street lamps illuminate the wet stones as the character continues past ornate balconied buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with social gathering area approaching plaza

events.description: approaching group of seated NPCs gathered outside building
turning toward open plaza area with large mansion building

agents.ego_description: walking past a group of people sitting outside a building, then continuing toward an open plaza

notable_agents.action: group of four people sitting on chairs outside the building, socializing

entered.detail: single-story pink stucco building with green wooden shutters and porch
cluster of chairs and people gathered on the building porch
large two-story classical building with columns and illuminated windows at street end

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a pink building with green shutters where a group of NPCs are seated on the porch socializing. After passing the group, the scene opens into a wider plaza area featuring a large historic mansion with classical columns at the far end. The street remains wet and rain continues to fall as the character moves toward the open space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy nighttime city, transitioning from an open cobblestone street into a sheltered urban walkway. It begins on a narrow sidewalk beside the illuminated windows of the Lemoyne National Bank, moving as the character turns left onto a wider street where gas lamps cast warm reflections across the wet ground. As the camera advances, the open street gives way to a covered wooden sidewalk, shifting the perspective beneath a protective overhead awning. The scene then glides past historic storefronts adorned with posters and wall-mounted lanterns, passing a stationary horse-drawn carriage before moving deeper into the sheltered walkway.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered walkway into an open, rain-slicked city street that gradually expands into a wide historic plaza. It begins as the character steps out from under a covered path onto wet cobblestones, passing a glowing saloon and a parked wooden freight wagon under the light of flickering gas lamps. As the camera moves past ornate balconied buildings, the scene shifts toward a pink residence with green shutters where a group of people socialize on the porch. The perspective then opens up, leaving the narrow street behind to reveal a spacious plaza anchored by a large mansion with classical columns in the distance. The movement concludes as the character advances through the persistent rain toward the open architectural expanse.
